summary: Comprehensive frontend testing of Prayer-Specific Density Data feature in Daily Sessions page. All test cases passed successfully.

issues: Console warnings about chart width/height being -1 - minor visual issue during initial render

passed_tests: Prayer Sessions Bar shows correct prayer statuses: Fajr (completed), Dhuhr (completed), Asr/Maghrib/Isha/Taraweeh (no session)
Click Density tab (الكثافات) - loads density view
Prayer time selector shows status indicators (green=completed, gray=no session)
Click Fajr - displays density data with KPI grid, heatmap, side panel, zone list
Click Asr - shows empty state with message 'لا توجد جولة لصلاة العصر'
Empty state shows 'الصلوات المتاحة' (Available prayers) section
Switch prayer buttons (switch-prayer-fajr, switch-prayer-dhuhr) available in empty state
Click switch button - navigates to prayer with data and displays density components
Click Dhuhr - displays full density UI (KPI grid, heatmap, side panel, zone list)
seed_data_creation: Session for March 12, 2026 with Fajr and Dhuhr prayer sessions completed
context_for_next_testing_agent: Daily Sessions page has 1 session for March 12, 2026 with 2 completed prayer sessions (Fajr and Dhuhr). The DensityTab component correctly links crowd density data to prayer-specific zones. Prayer buttons show status indicators. Empty state for prayers without sessions shows available prayers with clickable switch buttons.

feature_verification.prayer_density_linking: PASS - Density data is linked to prayer-specific zones
feature_verification.status_indicators: PASS - Green dots for completed, gray for no session
feature_verification.empty_state: PASS - Shows correct Arabic message and available prayers
feature_verification.switch_functionality: PASS - Switch buttons navigate to prayers with data
feature_verification.density_components: PASS - KPI grid, heatmap, side panel, zone list all render correctly
